item.name: Iridescent Trout
item.description:
The scales of these fish are highly sought after by artisans in Kugane and beyond.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Spectral currents have given this wavekin's scales a faint iridescence. They are highly valued by artisans of the Far East, with the most radiant scales fetching a high price at auction.
